sentiment.reasoning: A 20% margin improvement in the latest quarter is a strong positive indicator of improved profitability and operational efficiency.

sentiment.reasoning: Hosting an investor day focused on a specific strategy can generate interest and provide clarity, potentially leading to a positive re-evaluation if the strategy is well-received.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
